creator: brittlehaus@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Thomas Zander from comment #2)
not the submitter but very interested in this port.

just uploaded poudriere logs for the three dependent ports, all build without complaint against audio/lv2

i can't vouch for their functionality as i'm only familiar with calf. 

audio/lv2 seems like more of an upgrade to audio/lv2core rather than a full replacement. it's the same codebase but pulls in what were previously extensions into the "core" so to speak.
